name: resolve_escalation
_note: repair.resolve_escalation is the operator's approve/dismiss decision on a queued escalation (UPDATE on migration 029 initiatives, scoped to trigger_type='system_repair_escalation'). It requires an actor (no_actor) and an id (missing_id). resolution !== 'approved' is coerced to 'dismissed' — approved → status 'acted', dismissed → status 'dismissed'. ok is true only when a row actually changed; resolving an unknown or non-repair id is ok:false. Against the live DB it never returns no_db. No numeric inputs, so the V2 fuzz vector only exercises the missing-id / unknown-id guards.
